description: Square graphic from ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' series. The full background is a high-contrast black and white close-up photograph of a pair of hands held out, palms up, in metal handcuffs. A dark gradient overlays the left side. The top-left headline in light-cyan small-caps serif reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL', with a white subline '2/12/2025 | Detroit, MI'. A red diagonal banner across the top-right corner reads 'DETROIT' in white serif caps. Mid-left, in large bold white sans-serif, is the name 'Juan Antonio Tamayo-Beltran'. Below that a bold white label 'CRIME:' followed by a bulleted list: 'Heroin trafficking conspiracy'. Bottom-left shows the round blue-and-white DHS seal next to the white serif 'ICE' wordmark. Bottom-right is a solid red box with white serif text reading '-THE- WORST FIRST'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/12/2025 | Detroit, MI; Juan Antonio Tamayo-Beltran; CRIME: Heroin trafficking conspiracy; DETROIT; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
